title: Big Heart Shaped Bowls 2pcs Porcelain White Heart-Shaped Dish for Desserts/Salad/Fruit/Pasta or Romantic Dinner, 23cm
features: Romantic dinner plate: Porcelain heart shaped bowls set are perfect for creating a romantic atmosphere can be used for any occasion, from a casual solo meal to a fancy dinner date or entertaining guests and catering service, add the sweet and happiness feeling of dining.
Versatile Bowl Set: 9-inch Large heart shaped plates match many uses of your life: salad, fruit, soup, Noodle, large dessert, cakes, pasta, bread, restaurant serving, family dinners and more.

High quality porcelain bowls: Made of premium fine porcelain, these heart shaped oven dishes are lead and cadmium-free - Heat resistant & impact resistant - Oven safe, microwave safe, dishwasher safe and disinfector safe, can be use straight from oven to table.
Lasting Cleaning:Porcelain Heart Bowl Glazed Resists Cracking and Staining - Very Smooth Surface - Easy to Clean, No Residue of Food Smell, Taste and Color, and Looks New After Every Use!

Exquisite gift: These heart shaped dishes are beautifully designed with clean and smooth lines, Both beautiful and practical, no doubt a good choice to be a perfect gift for your families, friends and neighbors at housewarming, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Weddings and Valentine's day.
description: Product Description Keponbee Porcelain X-Large Heart-shaped Bowls - 23cm About heart shaped bowl Product Details: Package: 2 x fine white porcelain bowls Capacity: 1300ml Weight: 820g/pc Specification: 23cm length, 6.4cm height Colour: Pure White Tips: Please don't put the hot baking dish into the cold water immediately to avoid any accidental Oven Safe Microwave Safe Dishwasher Safe Protective packing Elegant and timeless for those special occasions when you dress your dinner table to perfection, yet always suitable for daily use Deep plates can save space when the dining and cooking table so crowded with big plates The unique heart shape makes the cute bowl set more attractive among the regular bowls. Light and high-gloss glaze.
